sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
Channel wisdom and inner strength with our handcrafted Amethyst Fox Pendant — a symbol of intuition, clarity, and emotional balance. Designed to protect your aura while amplifying calm confidence.

Crafted from natural Amethyst crystal, this unique fox-shaped pendant blends symbolism with energy healing. The fox — known for its sharp instincts and adaptability — represents strategic thinking and spiritual awareness, while the amethyst crystal promotes emotional calm and mental clarity.

Perfect for those seeking balance between intuition and intellect, this pendant is a powerful companion for everyday wear or meditation rituals.

Set on a durable black braided cord, it carries both elegance and grounded strength — ideal for both men and women who embrace mindful living and spiritual style.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
💜 Hand-carved from genuine Amethyst crystal

🦊 Symbol of wisdom, protection, and intuitive power

✨ Helps calm the mind and uplift energy

🖤 Comes with adjustable black cord for versatile wear

🎁 Ideal for gifting or daily energy alignment

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text: Handcrafted from natural Amethyst crystal, known for its deep violet hue and calming energy. Each piece radiates intuition, protection, and spiritual clarity — making it both a style statement and an energy crystal neckpiece.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text:
Wear It Daily – Keep the pendant close to your skin to stay connected with its protective and energizing vibrations.

Set Your Intentions – Whether for protection, success, or spiritual growth, focus on your goal while wearing the pendant to align its energy with your desires.
